name: Card
description: Content container. Two flavours: standalone `card` (white on grey surface, 1px subdued stroke) and `inset` (no stroke, used inside sheets and modals).

platformNotes.swiftui: RoundedRectangle fill + strokeBorder. Use Theme.color.bg.container / Theme.color.bg.containerInset.
platformNotes.web: Class .card / .card-inset on a div. Borders are flat — never apply box-shadow.
